evals.prompt: Migrate this v6 ID Capture implementation to the current SDK API.
evals.expected_output: Updated IdCaptureViewController using acceptedDocuments with typed document objects, IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner()), didCapture(_:capturedId:) and didReject(_:capturedId:reason:) callbacks, and DataCaptureContext.initialize(licenseKey:) + DataCaptureContext.shared.

assertions.text: Replaces supportedDocuments bitmask with acceptedDocuments array using typed document objects e.g. IdCard(region: .any), DriverLicense(region: .any), Passport(region: .any)
Replaces didCaptureIn session:frameData: with didCapture(_:capturedId:) — reads capturedId directly from the parameter, NOT from session.newlyCapturedId
Replaces didRejectIn session:frameData: with didReject(_:capturedId:reason:) with a RejectionReason parameter
Does NOT reference IdCaptureSession or FrameData
Sets settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner()) — does NOT use settings.scannerType or settings.supportedSides

evals.prompt: Migrate this v7 ID Capture implementation to the current SDK API.
evals.expected_output: Updated IdCaptureViewController replacing settings.scannerType = FullDocumentScanner() with settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner()), and replacing DataCaptureContext.shared (accessed without initialization) with DataCaptureContext.initialize(licenseKey:) + DataCaptureContext.shared.

assertions.text: Replaces settings.scannerType = FullDocumentScanner() with settings.scanner = IdCaptureScanner(physicalDocument: FullDocumentScanner())
